title: eryngium multicapitatum
intro: Eryngium multicapitatum, also known as New Zealand thistle or sea eryngo, is a flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Eryngium multicapitatum can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infused oil for use in herbal remedies.
